channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: This new dating app is bringing a Pokémon Go approach to romance
item.description: Ever miss the thrill of the 2016 Pokémon Go craze? A new anti-swiping dating app has come to fill that void, but instead of cute Pokémon you can catch yourself a hot date. These days, trying to find a partner IRL, whether at a bar or reluctantly joining a singles running club, is no easy task.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: HBO Original Movie "Untitled" Project Announced for Spring Release on Max
item.description: Jesse Armstrong, creator of Succession, to make directorial debut with new HBO original movie on Max.
item.dc:creator: amelia.schwanke@futurenet.com (Amelia Schwanke), TechRadar

item.title: Daredevil: Born Again viewers have two wild fan theories about Foggy Nelson and Muse after the Marvel TV show's debut, but I think there's only one that might be right
item.description: Marvel fans have come up with two big theories after Daredevil: Born Again's two-episode premiere on Disney+.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: Microsoft hits back against UK competition lawsuits, slams AWS and Google once again
item.description: Microsoft is arguing its case against the CMA’s Provisional Decision Report, slamming AWS and Google too
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Turing Award Winners Pioneered Reinforcement Learning Method
item.description: Andrew Barto and Richard Sutton win the A.M. Turing Award for their work in reinforcement learning, a key technique in AI breakthroughs.
item.dc:creator: Matt O'Brien, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: How to boost Python program performance with Zig
item.description: Python might not be the fastest of languages, but it has many advantages. Users enjoy Python’s convenience and development speed, as well as its broad ecosystem of libraries. Something else people appreciate about Python is how it bridges language ecosystems.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Top data storage certifications to sharpen your skills
item.description: Enterprise data storage skills are in demand, and that means storage certifications can be more valuable to organizations looking for people with those qualifications.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Judge denies Elon Musk's request to block OpenAI for-profit conversion but welcomes trial
item.description: OAKLAND, Calif. (AP) — A federal judge has denied Elon Musk's request for a court order blocking OpenAI from converting itself to a for-profit company but said she could expedite a trial to consider Musk's claims against the ChatGPT maker and its CEO. U.S.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Chinese cyber espionage growing across all industry sectors
item.description: Security researchers are warning of a significant global rise in Chinese cyber espionage activity against organizations in every industry.
item.dc:creator: csoonline

item.title: Booker tells Musk he’s behind social media campaign: Keep your Cybertruck
item.description: Sen. Cory Booker (D-N.J.) on Tuesday revealed he was behind a social media campaign involving nearly two dozen Democratic senators after tech billionaire Elon Musk offered a Tesla Cybertruck to the first person to provide "proof" of who wrote the script, which he called "propaganda.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: VMware ESXi gets critical patches for in-the-wild virtual machine escape attack
item.description: Broadcom released emergency patches for its VMware ESXi, Workstation, and Fusion products to fix three vulnerabilities that can lead to virtual machine escape and are actively being exploited by attackers.
item.dc:creator: csoonline

item.title: Authorities use high tech to enhance border security
item.description: Surveillance cameras and drones give border officials an advantage; but the challenge of data-sharing silos remains.
item.dc:creator: Ali Bradley, NewsNation

item.title: Musk to meet with House Republicans to talk DOGE on Wednesday
item.description: Elon Musk is scheduled to meet with House Republicans in the Capitol on Wednesday evening, multiple sources confirmed to The Hill, to provide an update on the work of the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE). The huddle is scheduled to take place at the Capitol at 7 p.m. EST.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, The Hill

item.title: Tariffs for now won’t impact IT organizations
item.description: The impact of tariffs by the Trump Administration on semiconductors from Taiwan is so far not cause for alarm, according to one analyst.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: German mobile network goes all-in on AI
item.description: With the AI Phone and Magenta AI, Deutsche Telekom is helping to shape further developments in the smartphone sector.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Teradata adds Enterprise Vector Store to augment RAG
item.description: Teradata is adding vector support to its platform in the form of a new Enterprise Vector Store, an in-database offering, to enable and augment use cases that require retrieval augmented generation (RAG), such as agentic AI.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Georgia lawmakers push to ban automated speed cameras near schools
item.description: Some Georgia lawmakers are trying to get rid of automated cameras that enforce school zone speed limits, saying the cameras are more about making money than the safety of children.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Amy, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: MrBeast lost ‘tens of millions’ on his Amazon show. That’s a sign for other creators
item.description: Hollywood is waking up to the power of influencers. That starts with MrBeast. Amazon’s Beast Games cost hundreds of millions to produce. Some of that came from the streamer, but much of it came from the pockets of MrBeast, whose real name is Jimmy Donaldson.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: Tariffs an 'expensive game to play': Powerteam International CEO
item.description: Tariffs are going to be an "expensive game to play," Bill Walsh, CEO and founder of Powerteam International, said.
item.dc:creator: Connell McShane, NewsNation

item.title: AI Chatbots have telltale quirks. Researchers can spot them with 97% accuracy
item.description: There’s a cat-and-mouse game between those using generative AI chatbots to produce text undetected and those trying to catch them. Many believe they know the telltale signs—though as a journalist fond of the word “delve” and prone to em-dashes, I’m not so sure. Researchers at four U.S.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: UK data protection watchdog investigating how TikTok uses children's personal data
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The U.K.'s data protection watchdog said Monday that it's investigating how TikTok uses the personal information of teenagers to deliver content recommendations to them when they use the social media platform.
item.dc:creator: SYLVIA HUI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: The most relevant new features in JDK 24
item.description: Since 2018, we’ve had a new release of the Java platform every six months. With Swiss watch-like regularity, the latest version of Java, JDK 24, is upon us.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Microsoft shutting down Skype in May
item.description: Microsoft is closing down Skype, the video-calling service it bought for $8.5 billion in 2011, which had helped spark a transformation in how people communicate online.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Federal Executive Forum Artificial Intelligence Strategies in Government Progress and Best Practices 2025
item.description: How are agencies refining their AI strategy? The post Federal Executive Forum Artificial Intelligence Strategies in Government Progress and Best Practices 2025 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: How to restore a deleted text message on iPhone
item.description: Accidentally deleting a text message on your iPhone or iPad is not a problem if you still need the message. Apple has a built-in way to recover it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The rising threat of shadow AI
item.description: Employees in a large financial organization began developing AI tools to automate time-consuming tasks such as weekly report generation. They didn’t think about what could go wrong. Within a few months, unauthorized applications skyrocketed from just a couple to 65.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: How secure information sharing can be easier, less burdensome
item.description: Bill Anderson, the principal product manager at Mattermost, said agencies need to understand how to remove some of the complexities to improve collaboration. The post How secure information sharing can be easier, less burdensome first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Network jobs watch: Hiring, skills and certification trends
item.description: Network and infrastructure roles continue to shift as enterprises adopt technologies such as AI-driven network operations, multicloud networking, zero trust network access (ZTNA), and SD-WAN.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Gabbard decries Britain's reported demand for Apple to provide backdoor access to users' cloud data
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard says she has serious concerns about the British government's reported demand that Apple provide backdoor access to any data stored in the cloud.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: NFL NextGen Stats team unveils new tool to help fans better understand combine results
item.description: The NFL scouting combine provides a blizzard of data with hundreds of prospects running through various drills ranging from the 40-yard dash to the vertical jump to a short shuttle.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: AI & Data Exchange 2025: Salesforce’s Jamison Braun on how AI is reshaping public service
item.description: Agencies are driven by rapid technology changes, upskilling needs and a high bar for CX, Salesforce’s vice president of strategy and business development says. The post AI & Data Exchange 2025: Salesforce’s Jamison Braun on how AI is reshaping public service first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jory Heckman, Federal News Network

item.title: AI & Data Exchange 2025: Guidehouse’s Stuart Brown on AI and digital modernization trends for 2025
item.description: Expect a key trend to be updates to IT architectures so agencies can take advantage of large language models, the Guidehouse digital leader says. The post AI & Data Exchange 2025: Guidehouse’s Stuart Brown on AI and digital modernization trends for 2025 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Nvidia sales surge in the fourth quarter on demand for AI chips
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Nvidia on Wednesday reported a surge in fourth-quarter profit and sales as demand for its specialized Blackwell chips, which power artificial intelligence systems, continued to grow, sending the company's stock higher after hours. For the three months that ended Jan.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, KRON4
